name: atril-common
title: atril-common
description:
MATE document viewer (common files)
Atril is a simple multi-page document viewer.  It can display
and print PostScript (PS), Encapsulated PostScript (EPS), DJVU, DVI, EPUB,
ComicBook and Portable Document Format (PDF) files.
.
This package contains the architecture independent files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use atril-common because MATE document viewer (common files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use atril-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair atril-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `atril-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
